See How We Help

Personalised Support for Every Child. 

From Foundation to Year 12.

At Kinetic Education, every child’s learning journey starts with understanding them. We find out what your child already knows, where the gaps are, and where they’re ready to progress — because every child learns differently.

Whether your child is struggling and needs confidence, ready for a challenge, or learns differently, our personalised approach meets them exactly where they’re at.

We call this our Brick Wall Approach — because learning builds on itself.

If a few bricks are missing early on, everything that comes next can feel shaky. We go back, fill in the gaps, and rebuild strong foundations, giving every child the tools they need to catch up, keep up, and get ahead.

100,000+

Most children will learn much better. It's interactive, individualised, special and it works.

How We Help Your Child Build Confidence and Long Lasting Results

For more than 30 years, we’ve supported over 100,000 Australian families, helping their children build confidence, catch up at school, and discover a love of learning.

Our unique way of teaching combines the best of both worlds - real Aussie tutors who understand how kids learn, and smart technology that makes every lesson personal, interactive, and effective.

Parents tell us the difference isn’t just in grades; it’s in their child’s attitude and confidence.

Children who once avoided studying now enjoy their weekly routine, feel proud of their progress, and families feel the pressure lift.

Get 2 Weeks Free Tutoring

Assessment first

We begin with an assessment to understand where your child's learning currently is and identify any gaps that may be holding them back. From here, we create a personalised weekly learning plan tailored to your child's needs.

Personalised Learning Plans

Your child’s personalised lesson plan is delivered weekly and can be completed at home on a tablet or computer. It updates each Monday and adapts as they progress, keeping learning at the right level.

Proven Progress

As your child strengthens their foundations, you’ll see them build skills and confidence, and keep moving forward at a pace that feels right for them.

Expert Tutors Available

If your child needs extra support, our online tutors are there to explain concepts further and answer questions, so your child can continue with confidence.

Struggling Students  

For children who are struggling at school, learning something new can feel overwhelming. When confidence is already low and key skills are missing, it can be hard to keep up, even when they are genuinely trying. It is not always easy to pinpoint exactly where the struggle is coming from in a busy classroom. Lessons keep moving and the focus is often on what children are learning right now, not the earlier skills they may have missed along the way, which can quietly keep holding them back.

At Kinetic Education, we start with an assessment to identify the specific gaps in your child’s learning across the Australian National Curriculum. From there, we take your child back to the point where those gaps first appeared, and build a personalised learning plan around the level they are ready for.

We tailor learning to your child’s needs, so they can work through their personalised learning plan at a pace that feels right for them. As a family, you also have real tutor support along the way, so you can understand how your child is progressing and they can get extra help when they need it. As they progress, their confidence grows and they start to feel better about learning.

By combining online Maths and English learning with real tutor support, we help your child strengthen their learning foundations, make steady progress, and feel more confident at school.

 

 

 

Get 2 Weeks Free Tutoring
Intermediate Students

Many children are doing well at school, but because they are coping and not actively needing extra support, they can slip into the “doing fine” category. This is more common than many families realise. Over time, they may start to coast along rather than being challenged, which can affect motivation and confidence. If your child is going well at school, you might not feel like extra support is necessary at first. Or you might be considering a little extra help to keep them moving forward, but not be sure what support they would benefit from most.

We assess your child across a range of Maths and English concepts from the Australian Curriculum to understand what they know, what they feel confident with, and where they are ready to be extended.

From there, we create a personalised learning plan that strengthens key skills and adds the right level of challenge. As they progress, we continue to support what they are learning at school while also introducing new topics early, so they feel prepared when those concepts come up in class.

By combining online Maths and English learning with real tutor support, we help your child make progress, build confidence, and feel ready for what’s next.

 

 

Get 2 Weeks Free Tutoring
Advanced Students

When a child is already one step ahead, extra support can help them stay motivated and comfortable with more advanced concepts. It builds depth in their understanding and provides the right level of challenge so they continue developing strong Maths and English skills.

We start with an assessment aligned to the Australian Curriculum to understand your child’s current level across Maths and English and identify where they’re ready to be challenged next. From there, we create a personalised learning plan with extension activities that keeps them progressing at a steady pace. As your child moves forward, lessons adapt to build deeper understanding and help them stay one step ahead, which can be especially helpful when preparing for exams.

Along the way, you receive clear updates on your child’s progress, and your child can access real tutor support whenever they need extra help or have questions.

By combining online Maths and English learning with real tutor support, we help your child make progress, build confidence, and feel ready for what’s next.

This approach is particularly beneficial for students who are:

• Working in accelerated learning programs
• Preparing for Selective School entry
• Preparing for scholarship examinations
• Aiming to maximise their ATAR
• Looking to build even greater confidence and understanding

 

Get 2 Weeks Free Tutoring
Neurodiverse Students

Our online tutoring supports neurodivergent children and those with different learning needs, including ADHD, Autism, Dyslexia, Dysgraphia, Dyscalculia, and more.

School can sometimes feel overwhelming for neurodivergent children. For many, learning at home in a familiar, safe space can be a great fit. We also know confidence and consistency can be just as important as the content itself.

By combining online Maths and English learning with real tutor support, we help your child make progress, build confidence, and feel ready for what’s next.

Our online learning is engaging, with short, interactive lessons and real rewards. We often recommend regular sessions of around 15 to 20 minutes, so learning feels manageable and achievable.

Every child learns differently, so we start with a conversation to understand your child’s needs and make sure our approach is the right fit. From there, we tailor a personalised learning plan, with tutor support available when your child needs extra help or has questions. You also receive a weekly report with clear updates on progress, along with regular phone check-ins from your tutor.

 

 

How We Help Neurodiverse Students
Homeschool Families

Homeschooling looks different for every family. Whether it’s a personal choice, frequent travel, flexibility for your child, or a learning style that works better outside a traditional classroom, having the right support can make a big difference.

We work alongside homeschooling families to provide structured Maths and English learning that fits into your routine. We start with an assessment to understand your child’s current level, then build a personalised learning plan each week that adapts as they learn. This takes the guesswork out of what to teach and when, because your child’s learning is planned week by week, and they are always working on the skills they need most.

Your child can work at a pace that feels right for them, with real tutor support available when extra help or guidance is needed. You also receive clear weekly updates on progress, so you can feel confident about what your child is learning and how they are tracking over time.

By combining online Maths and English learning with real tutor support, we help your child make progress, build confidence, and feel ready for what’s next.

 

 

Get 2 Weeks Free Tutoring
NAPLAN & Exam Preparation  

Preparing for exams can feel stressful for both children and parents. Whether it’s NAPLAN, selective school entry exams, scholarships, or senior assessments, it can be hard to know what to focus on and how to prepare without adding extra pressure.

We start with an assessment to understand your child’s current level across Maths and English, then create a personalised learning plan that focuses on the skills they need most, while also keeping them one step ahead. Learning is planned week by week and adapts as your child progresses, so you can feel confident they’re working on the right areas at the right time.

Our online learning helps children build a consistent study routine for assessments, with real tutor support available when they need extra guidance or clarification. You also receive regular updates on progress, so you can feel confident about how your child is tracking as exam time approaches.

By combining online Maths and English learning with real tutor support, we help your child make progress, build confidence, and feel ready for what’s next.

 

How We Help Students with NAPLAN

Why Families Choose Kinetic Education

You’ve seen the apps that promise results but leave children feeling lost.  You’ve also seen traditional tutoring that’s expensive, rigid, and hard to stick with.

Kinetic Education is different.

We combine self-paced learning (so your child learns when it suits your schedule) with real Australian tutors who check in, adjust lessons, and keep them on track.

It's the perfect mix of technology and human connection, the way learning should feel.
No more wondering if it's working. You'll see the progress every week: in the results, in your child's confidence, and in the smiles that come back to homework time.

Because when a child believes they can do it… they do.

Our girls and I absolutely love Kinetic education for math.

Our girls and I absolutely love Kinetic education for math. I've seen a lot of improvement since they've started at the beginning of the year. I think they enjoy it most because it is only a few minutes of their day, with examples to guide and the added bonus of earning points for every task you complete to get themselves a gift card - a great incentive if you ask me, which has helped with our daughter who has Dyscalculia. Caryl W

ProductReview Verified

Better and better!

My son, Chase (12 yrs), was diagnosed with autism and adhd at 6 yrs of age. Schooling has been difficult, as he has changed school a few times (at no fault of his own), and some schools have not been forthcoming with assistance and patience. This has resulted in low self-esteem for Chase, a lack of friendships due to self-doubt and an inability to find patience with himself and others. Since starting Kinetic Education, about 4 months ago, Chase has not only grown in self-esteem and patience, but he has also grown in his interactions and friendships with those he is around. Even while Kinetic Education has the incentives to inspire a child to learn, ie; points, extra learning, games and prizes, this is not the main part Chase enjoys.... It's the end of each section when he sees how well he has done, that makes it worth while. The smile and squeal of excitement displayed, makes it so very worth it. Kinetic Education is a service I will always be grateful for, and glad to know.

Rated 5 stars out of 5

Kim

ProductReview Verified

Amazing program.. The education department needs to allow children to access this program at school

I was introduced to kinetic education back in 2015, when I was told my daughter was failing at school and needed a tutor. Having worked as a teacher's aide I changed my employment hours to suit my children's needs after school and trialed kinetic education for 3 months.. in those three months my children's performance at school started to change, their confidence in the knowledge they were learning in kinetic helped them to answer questions in class. After the 3 month trial was over I signed up for 12 months in for both my children in this time one of my children had their naplan tests, the results were amazing, obtaining not only top in her school but coming top 10% nationally for literacy, writing and reading was just awesome. I have now signed my children up to kinetic for the full package. The kinetic tutors not only set reasonable lesson plans they adapt them to what their teachers are delivering in class so they are aware before the teacher delivers that section of the curriculum. The tutors are happy to speak to my children on a regular basis to help encourage my children in keeping up to date with their lessons. My children also love the competitions and spending their points in the shop. I'm very grateful for being introduced to this program.

This is a fantastic program to help any student in their educational journey. Having two children with learning disabilities I have found this program very useful to help them keep up with the subject matter they have learnt at school and not understood. I am so pleased to see both of my daughters (Yr 4 & Yr 5) who were extremely anxious about maths now have confidence in themselves. Amazing progress so far!

My 2 sons both commenced Kinetic tutoring at the start of this year. One in Year 1 and the other in year 2. ProductReview Verified

Amazing improvement in confidence

My 8 year old (ASD, ADHD) started in January this year and we are already seeing a dramatic improvement in his confidence - everyday last year i had to personally take him to his classroom where he would beg me not to leave him there plus every night and morning he would beg not to go to school. Since starting with Kinetic Education he rarely begs not to go to school and i have not had to take him to his classroom at all. I can also leave the schoolgrounds prior to the bell going. He also admits that the lessons are really helping him. can't wait to see how much more he can achieve.

Rated 5 stars out of 5

Carolyn

ProductReview Verified

Child with ADHD/Anxiety - Success!

We are so happy with this program! Our 10yr old has severe ADHD and Anxiety and we have struggled for years with homework. Homework efforts would result in tears and frustration but now we have a child who actively engages in his online lessons and celebrates his achievements. He is gaining confidence and is starting to catch up to his year level. We can't wait to see what the future holds and to see him reach his potential!

Rated 5 stars out of 5

Thilini

ProductReview Verified

Great program for extension

My son is academically gifted and he doesn't frequently get the extension he needs in the school classroom. Kinetic app has been providing him more opportunities to extend himself. The content is clear as well that he can learn himself without assistance. I like how it tracks the competency and keep repeating until they master the lesson.

Rated 5 stars out of 5

Sherree Cavanagh

ProductReview Verified

Extension Learning

My kids find this program is able to offer extension activities that build on the work they are doing at school.

Rated 5 stars out of 5

Kristy R

ProductReview Verified

A must have for all families!

This is perfect for families that have children that are struggling at school, that want to extend their child further or if their child wants to perform better in class which will help them to have more self esteem if it's lacking. I have one son who needed extension work with maths and was very bored at school doing maths and he now has his passion back for maths! It has also benefited his English too. My younger son has Autism and this is great for him as he is a visual learner and the tutorial at the start really helps him to understand the concept. It was definitely not easy at the start with Hamish as he could only sit for around 10 minutes, but now he can do it for 1 hour which is amazing. The tutors have been extremely helpful to help us explain things to him that he wasn't understanding or grasping the concept. Kinetic Education has fit in our life well as we are very busy with after school activities and we are able to do it before and after activities and know when the best time is for them to concentrate and are able to do it in the comfort of your own home. The boys also love working towards getting their rewards like movie vouchers, iTunes vouchers etc.

Rated 5 stars out of 5

Alan D

ProductReview Verified

Kinetic Education Tuition

The service provided by Kinetic Education for our son has been invaluable. The issues were addressed from where the gaps in understanding began. The staff are very helpful and flexible with payment arrangements when necessary and very informative on catch up calls. Our child is now advancing greatly in his approach to work at school. All content is agreeable with a child's ability and also offers them the chance to push a little or do more. Great service. Thank you.

Rated 5 stars out of 5

Iman D

ProductReview Verified

Now we have tried it, we will NEVER go back!

My son started less than a year ago, with some fundamental gaps in his maths from grades 3 upwards. He is now doing year6/7 maths, and in English he is doing senior high school work! That's years 11/12! Couldn't be happier with this AMAZING tutoring program, and my son's huge leaps and advances have been all due to kinetic!

Rated 5 stars out of 5

Angelica

ProductReview Verified

This will be the best product you could buy for your children!

Not only is this an amazing product which makes learning Mathematics and English easy and fun, the tutoring and support from the team exceeded my expectations. You get professional support and great results. I have been using this product myself from when I was in grade 3. I am now in Year 12 about to sit my HSC and I am confident that this product has taught me more than what my teachers have taught me through the years. I have even achieved A grades! When I was in Year 6 I was already beginning to complete the 12th grade English program because I was enjoying how Kinetic taught the information. I am now in the top Advanced English course and very proud of my academic achievements. As a student thriving from this product, I strongly recommend this to any other child willing to succeed.

Rated 5 stars out of 5

Diana

ProductReview Verified

Definitely worth it!

For children that are high achievers or are more advanced than their current year at school... kinetic gives that little extra to keep them going and striving for more! Being able to cater for the individual need through the great tutors over the phone is fantastic! You tell them what works and what doesn’t work and they will deliver! Kinetic has enabled my child to be a high achiever in both school and outside school! He is able to work closely with the teacher to mentor and guide his peers in class that require extra help! Thank you to the team at kinetic education for giving my child a great start to education!

Rated 5 stars out of 5

Connie

ProductReview Verified

Best Australian Educational Program By Far!!!!

We have been using this program now for over a year. I have 4 children all with different abilities. Caters for the most advanced right through to child that struggles at school. Graeme, tutor, is amazing and on top of progress of each child, making adjustments as we go. Children enjoy the learning as it's interactive and relevant. We have used other teaching programs but have not seen results like Kinetic has achieved. Affordable and actually works. Can't praise it enough!

My 2 boys have been with kinetic education for about 6 months. Not only have they caught up to their current year level, they have exceeded beyond their year level which is amazing. I am very happy with kinetic education. My boys gaps have closed, their confidence has improved and they are no longer struggling.

Great improvement

Ever since my son started with kinetic Education, he has improved so much. He now take the initiative of doing his homework without being reminded, his grades have gone high. We can't thank kinetic Education enough for their helping hand to my son's success throughout this year and we will continue to work with kinetic Education throughout my son's school time. We are very grateful with kinetic Education staff who are very professional, kind and always ready to help whenever we called in for help and if we didn't talk them, they will take their time to check on how my son is going and if there is any help my son needs. So I will recommend kinetic Education to any parent whose child may be struggling with their Maths or English etc. Thank you very kinetic Education.

Get 2 Weeks Free Tutoring Read 100+ Verified Reviews

Full Support for the Australian Maths and English Curriculum, From Foundation to Year 12

At Kinetic Education, we follow the Australian curriculum for Maths and English, giving your child exactly what they need to stay on track, catch up, or get ahead. Every child learns differently, which is why our tutors and personalised online lessons work together to make learning simple, structured, and effective.

Our tutoring programs guide your child through the core maths and English skills that matter most. You can explore our Maths and English programs below.
